root.name: add_bmi_formula_textbox
root.description: Evaluates if a text box with the BMI formula is correctly added and positioned on slide 2.

children.name: textbox_added_slide2
children.description: Checks that a new text box is added to slide 2.

children.name: textbox_content_correct
children.description: Checks the content of the added text box matches the BMI formula.

children.name: textbox_position_bottom_right
children.description: Verifies the BMI formula text box is at the bottom right of slide 2.

children.name: no_extraneous_modifications
children.description: Checks that no other slides or elements are unnecessarily changed.

metadata.task: Add a text box with BMI calculation formula 'BMI = (Weight in kg)/(Height in m)2​' positioned at the bottom right of slide 2
